BatchGetInvoiceProfile.description: Grants permission to get invoice profile details for an account in your organization

CreateInvoiceUnit.description: Grants permission to create an invoice unit for your organization

CreateProcurementPortalPreference.description: Grants permission to create a procurement portal preference

DeleteInvoiceUnit.description: Grants permission to update an invoice unit for your organization

DeleteProcurementPortalPreference.description: Grants permission to delete a procurement portal preference

GetInvoiceCorrection.description: Grants permission to get Invoice Correction

GetInvoiceEmailDeliveryPreferences.description: Grants permission to get Invoice Email Delivery Preferences

GetInvoicePDF.description: Grants permission to get downloadable Invoice document pre-signed URL with supplemental documents

GetInvoiceUnit.description: Grants permission to get invoice units for your organization

GetProcurementPortalPreference.description: Grants permission to get a procurement portal preference

ListInvoiceCorrections.description: Grants permission to list Invoice Corrections

ListInvoiceSummaries.description: Grants permission to get Invoice summary information for your account or linked account

ListInvoiceUnits.description: Grants permission to list invoice units for your organization

ListProcurementPortalPreferences.description: Grants permission to list procurement portal preferences for an account

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list tags for a resource

PutInvoiceEmailDeliveryPreferences.description: Grants permission to put Invoice Email Delivery Preferences

PutProcurementPortalPreference.description: Grants permission to update a procurement portal preference

StartInvoiceCorrection.description: Grants permission to start Invoice Correction

TagResource.description: Grants permission to tag a resource

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to untag a resource

UpdateInvoiceUnit.description: Grants permission to update an invoice unit for your organization

UpdateProcurementPortalPreferenceStatus.description: Grants permission to update the status for a procurement portal preference

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by allowed set of values for each of the tags

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by tag-value associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by presence of mandatory tags in the request
